title: Resolve, to Rename a Bridge in West Forks Plantation and The Forks Plantation the Gordon Clifton Berry, Sr. Bridge
last_house_action: 2/24/2026 - Speaker laid before the House Subsequently, the Resolve was FINALLY PASSED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.

actions.description: Received by the Clerk of the House on December 3, 2025. The Resolve was REFERRED to the Committee on TRANSPORTATION pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2 and ordered printed pursuant to Joint Rule 401.
CONSENT CALENDAR - FIRST DAY Under suspension of the rules CONSENT CALENDAR - SECOND DAY. The Resolve was PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED. Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
Report READ and ACCEPTED , in concurrence. Bill READ ONCE. ASSIGNED FOR SECOND READING NEXT LEGISLATIVE DAY.
COMMITTEE ON BILLS IN THE SECOND READING REPORTS NO FURTHER VERBAL AMENDMENTS NECESSARY. REPORT ACCEPTED READ A SECOND TIME and PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED , in concurrence. Ordered sent down forthwith
On motion of Representative CARUSO of Caratunk, TABLED pending FINAL PASSAGE . Later today assigned.
Speaker laid before the House Subsequently, the Resolve was FINALLY PASSED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
